results.description: App icon for MARLIFT SERVICE, a forklift maintenance company. Features a bold wrench tool icon in golden yellow (#f5b400) on a dark charcoal background (#2b2b2b), with the letters 'M' subtly integrated into the wrench design. Clean, modern, minimal style suitable for a mobile app icon. No text, just the icon symbol.
